title: Familiar - Wikipedia
summary: In European folklore of the medieval and early modern periods, familiars (strictly familiar spirits) were supernatural entities believed to assist witches and cunning folk in their practice of magic.

title: What Are Familiars? - Indigo Spirituality
summary: An accessible explainer on familiars from a Pagan perspective — covering their spiritual role, history, and how they are recognized in modern practice.

title: FAMILIARS — Vegan Cafe, Brooklyn
summary: A 100% vegan cafe in Brooklyn proudly serving Duh! Donuts, freshly baked everything bagels, and locally roasted Honeymoon Coffee.

title: Familiars Coffee & Tea — Northampton, MA
summary: A specialty coffee and tea shop in Northampton, MA, using locally sourced food and ingredients.

title: FAMILIARS Synonyms — Merriam-Webster
summary: Merriam-Webster thesaurus entry listing 77 synonyms and antonyms for 'familiars', including lovers, fans, regulars, patrons, and denizens.
